description: A customer who chose to have their tickets mailed now wants to switch to digital mobile tickets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the order and sees the delivery method is 'Standard Mail'.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the physical tickets have not yet been mailed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the tickets have not been shipped.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the physical ticket printing and change the delivery method to 'Mobile'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the delivery method.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the digital tickets to the customer's email.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the mobile tickets to the customer.
